name: Fireflies
short_description: Immerse yourself in Fireflies, a Voxel-based Puzzle Platformer which takes place in a dark and dangerous world that you must venture to discover its secrets. Overcome difficult levels with menacing creatures lurking and ready to take you down.
detailed_description:
ADD TO YOUR WISHLIST NOW! Receive some nice treats, like discounts, swag, updates and much more!




Hide or crawl to avoid attention and discover the depth of mysteries to this world as you find hints and connect the hidden pieces in every corner.
Don’t fear the creatures you’ll find and if you’re lost just remember to follow the Fireflies.

Key Features:


  • Challenging Puzzle Platformer
    The gameplay of Fireflies is tough and will challenge you throughout the many scenarios while you escape dangerous enemies. Solve puzzles and find your way through the world as you follow the trail of the Fireflies.


  • Deep and Mysterious Narrative
    The narrative of Fireflies explores the depth of a mind troubled by fears and trauma. The creatures, constructions and challenges in Fireflies are shaped by this twisted mind. There's many ways to understand the world of Fireflies as you try to unravel its clues and hints. This task isn't for you alone, but for everyone.


  • Stunning Voxel Visuals
    Fireflies has stunning art, mixing 3D within a Platformer to create menacing, yet beautiful environments. Characters, scenarios and enemies are all made with a state of the art voxel visual which creates a great contrast should only be used when comparing two things, not multiple as its been used in this sentence.


  • Menacing Thematic Worlds
    The various locales of Fireflies are as dangerous as they are deep and astounding. From dark forests to shadowy streets, every place is more than it seems as they hide secrets and stories from deep inside a scared mind.
